description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events for all branches except travis_ccache. The workflow has three jobs: clang-format, build. The clang-format job checks code formatting using clang-format-lint-action. The build job runs a matrix of builds across different operating systems (Windows, Ubuntu, macOS) and generators (Visual Studio, Unix Makefiles, Ninja), with various configurations (in-source and out-of-source builds, with and without unity builds). For each build, it checks out the code, sets up the environment, installs dependencies (Boost), creates a build space, runs CMake, builds, and tests.
